item.title: Intuit 在四个月内两次废弃了自己的人工智能代理架构。在 VB Transform 2026 上，其 AI 副总裁称这是快速路径
item.summary: Intuit was an early pioneer in the usage of agentic AI, but its path to success has hardly been a straight line. At VB Transform 2026 , Intuit VP of AI Nhung Ho described how the company rebuilt its agent architecture twice in the span of about four months, first moving from a fleet of specialist agents to a central or
